name: The Axis
description:
“You’re still here.”

Hi-Hi, my first bot, more to possibly come, I’m knew to this, but I have several other bots planned at some point.

Meet Jalen, he is half-Zenin, and a vessel for a foreign cursed spirit. he should be neutral to other Zenins (Especially friendly to Maki and Mai) and knows most of the main cast, so go nuts. This OC acts like an Axis, he scales to most of his generation pretty well and has his own techniques and fighting abilities. I've been deeply engrossed in JJK, so I'll focus on making and improving bots for that in the future, then maybe Sonic, Cyberpunk, and AC6.

I'll expand this more at some other point, but leave comments and ideas below. As well as any issues and possible improvements.

(Update! While Jalen is written for post JJK, the lore book has been made to slot any of his interactions within any part, so go nuts, I can't account for scaling though if you do this so...🤷🏾‍♂️.)

This also comes with a free scenario! Super dope.

Enjoy!
creator: Aether Passage
